overview: FiberNMS is a carrier-grade, SaaS-based Optical Fiber Network Management System (OFNMS) built for telecom operators, ISPs, and infrastructure providers. It features a complete enterprise administration system with Super Admin control panel, multi-tenant company management, subscription billing, global user management, audit logs, security monitoring, and advanced analytics — all layered on top of a full-featured NOC platform with 14+ pages for real-time network monitoring, AI-powered predictive intelligence, and multi-layer topology visualization.
features: Super Admin Control Panel with global platform overview (MRR/ARR, 54+ companies, 1000+ users)
Company (Tenant) Management with detail views, usage stats, billing history, and lifecycle management
Global User Management with RBAC roles, session tracking, bulk import, and force logout
Order & Billing Management with MRR/ARR dashboards, invoice management, PDF download, and tax details
Usage & Limit Tracking with progress bars and threshold warnings per company
RBAC + ABAC Access Control with granular permission matrix and attribute-based rules
Audit Logs & Compliance with timeline view, multi-field filtering, and CSV export
Security Dashboard with login trends, IP tracking, suspicious activity detection, and MFA status
Advanced Analytics with top customers, device growth trends, alert trends, and usage heatmaps
Tenant-Side Admin Panel for per-company operator view
4-tier subscription system (BASIC/PRO/ENTERPRISE/ULTRA) with feature gating and upgrade paths
Full NOC platform: GIS map, devices, multi-layer topology, real-time monitoring, AI assistant, SLA dashboard, predictive intelligence, capacity planning
